title: High Hermit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The title of '''High Hermit''' was held by the leader of the [[Ancient Order of Pessimists]], a religious group based on [[Maryx Minor/Legends|Maryx Minor]]. The [[Unidentified High Hermit|last individual]] known to have gone by that title [[Death/Legends|died]] in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] following an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]].

==Appearances==
*[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
